title: Breakwave Tanker Report 11.18.2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 18/11/2025
VLCC Market Overheats as Seasonality Tailwinds Kick in - The VLCC market extended its strong upward momentum into mid-November
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-11-18_BreakwaveTankersNovember182025Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2025-11-18_BreakwaveTankersNovember182025Report.pdf

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
November 18, 2025
• VLCC Market Overheats as Seasonality Tailwinds Kick in - The VLCC market
Short-term Indicators
extended its strong upward momentum into mid-November, with rising enquiry
Momentum: Positive
levels driving a decisive tightening across major loading regions. Although the Bahri
program briefly softened AG demand early in the month, activity rebounded Sentiment: Positive
quickly as position lists continued to shrink and sentiment strengthened across all Fundamentals: Positive
long-haul routes. Shorter lists and stronger owner resistance tightened availability
further, while cross-basin rebalancing between the AG and WAF continued to pull
prompt tonnage out of the Atlantic.
